title: Red Pandas!
description:
This Mod adds red pandas into the game. They are breadable, spawnable by Spawn-Eggs and have a custom AI.

Forga, NeoForge and 1.21 planned.
body:
# Red Panda Mod for Minecraft 1.20.x

Bring the red panda into your Minecraft world with this Fabric mod! Designed for versions 1.20.x and requiring the Fabric API, this mod introduces red pandas that spawn naturally in bamboo jungles and taigas. You can also spawn them via spawneggs. 

![Red Panda on a Jungle tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b78fe147d0d0faa31461476b98b18b49f80706bc.webp)

They feature custom AI, custom sounds, and detailed 3D models with unique textures. Even better, they are breedable, allowing you to raise your own family of red pandas. 

![Red Panda Breeding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZFSkCjbw/images/3b3c3fffdf01b3fa04965abb055c085e70a75e96.png)

Add a touch of cuteness and excitement to your Minecraft adventures with the Red Panda Mod!
